changes.desc: Replace inferPattern() with renderPattern() — interpolated execution prompts

before.desc: Replace inferPattern() with renderPattern() in src/runtime/brief.ts. Interpolates description, produces, consumes, position, mode into a concrete 7-line execution prompt. Execute mode: TASK/PRODUCE/CONSUME/SCOPE/VERIFY/BLOCKED/MODE. Plan mode: TASK/DECOMPOSE/POSITION/OUTPUT/VERIFY. Uses only data already in scope (spec, g.desc, position). No new imports.

after.desc: Remove loop CLI command

note: loop CLI removed, receipts kept in runtime

before.desc: Create src/runtime/execution-miner.ts. Pure function mineExecution(dag, context, attributionWarnings?) → ExecutionFindings. Reads context.handoffs for unaddressed discoveries (discovered[] items where no successor node's desc references them) and unresolved blockers. Reads context.completion for weak evidence (nodes where all shell validators are grep-only). Reads context.scoring for velocity signals (batches with retry > 0 or duration > 2x median). attributionWarnings is the list of files changed outside produces. No IO. No imports from node:. Export ExecutionFindings type.

after.desc: Pure execution mining function

note: mineExecution exported, pure, all validators pass

before.desc: Create src/runtime/trajectory.ts. Pure function assessTrajectory(findings, chainLinks, rootIntent, currentDagId) → TrajectoryAssessment. Compares current ExecutionFindings against previous iterations' execution reports (from ChainLink[].executionReport). Computes trend: converging (findings decreasing), stable (no findings), orbiting (persistent findings across 2+ iterations), diverging (new findings exceed resolved for 2+ iterations). Computes intentDistance based on whether unaddressed items relate to root intent keywords. Export TrajectoryAssessment type.

after.desc: Pure trajectory assessment

before.desc: Modify src/runtime/fleet.ts loadFleetContext and src/cli/orient.ts fleet orient. Instead of only reading head.json per repo, also scan heads/*.json. Filter out completed DAGs (those with _lineage.completedAt). Return all active DAGs per repo in fleet status. RepoStatus gains activeDAGs: { dagId, level, batch[], done, remaining }[]. The primary dagId remains head.json's DAG (if exists), but all active heads are visible.

after.desc: Scan heads/ for multi-DAG discovery

Every schema must have description, input, output, and at least one example.

before.desc: Create src/runtime/successor.ts. Pure function proposeSuccessor(assessment, findings, rootIntent, dag) → SuccessorProposal. When trajectory is converging and findings exist: action='continue', build specDraft with nodes mapped from unaddressed discoveries + weak evidence + unresolved blockers. dagId = currentDag.id + '-i' + (iteration+1). When trajectory is orbiting/diverging: action='orbit-break', include diagnosis. When no findings: action='converged'. Export SuccessorProposal type. specDraft.nodes must have concrete produces arrays (not empty).

after.desc: Pure successor proposal function

Return globalFrontier: { repo, dagId, nodeId, produces }[] — all nodes unblocked across all repos. Add globalFrontier to fleet orient output. Modify src/lib/fleet-types.ts to add FleetFrontierNode and globalFrontier to FleetStatus.
